markdownRemark.excerpt: As-salāmu ʿalaykum wa raḥmatullāhi wa barakātuh, The class today on The Prostration of Forgetfulness is CANCELLED. The class will resume next week in-shāʾ-Allāh…
markdownRemark.html:
As-salāmu ʿalaykum wa raḥmatullāhi wa barakātuh,

The class today on The Prostration of Forgetfulness is CANCELLED. The class will resume next week in-shāʾ-Allāh unless mentioned otherwise. Please disregard the previous email.

We apologize for the short notice and inconvenience that this may have caused. Please pass on this message.

Bārak Allāhu fīkum

Dār As-Ṣaḥāba Admin

frontmatter.title: CLASS CANCELLED FOR JULY 5TH
